title: Parisians are planning to 'poop in Seine river' amid Rs 12,522 crore expenditure on Olympics 2024!
description: The French are preparing for a significant protest against the government's allocation of over $1.5 billion (Rs 12,522 crore approx) to clean up the Seine River ahead of the Olympics. Residents in the vicinity, discontent with this decision, plan to express their disapproval by defecating in the freshly cleaned waterways. Think of it as a defecation flash mob of sorts!
